focus_anchor: current focus cut a public source available distribution

outcome.reason: Pure regression-pin over already-correct, static license metadata — defensive-only, no live gap. (Contrast TB-415, which fixes a real shipping leak.) Skip low-value 'lock already-correct values' test-only tasks; manual review + the daemon verify gate already cover this.

why_now:
the license metadata is correct on disk but has zero test coverage — the
delete-test condition "if the repo still declares 'All Rights Reserved'" holds only
by manual inspection, so a single careless metadata edit could ship a public cut
that reintroduces "All Rights Reserved", drops the PolyForm text, or adds an OSI
classifier with nothing failing.
